stem: Complete the table by writing the answer to each statement about binary representation.
review_notes: 2024 J277/01 Q1(b). Accept calculations equal to the same answer.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Write one numeric answer per row.

prefill.0,0: The smallest denary number that can be represented by a 4-bit binary number
prefill.1,0: The largest denary number that can be represented by a 6-bit binary number
prefill.2,0: The maximum number of different colours that can be represented with a colour depth of 7 bits
prefill.3,0: The minimum number of bits needed to represent 150 different characters in a character set

mark_points.text: 7 bits only gives 128 values, so 8 bits are needed for 150
